EXAMPLE
Silver for Dogs
(00:00)
All right, we’re going through more lead examples to see what the common
elements are along with where they match the outline and then I’ll give you
some commentary on them, too. This one is for another pet product. It’s a little
bit lengthier. This one is not for dog food, though. It’s for structured silver,
which is a liquid colloidal silver type product, but it’s bonded to water and I’m a
huge believer in silver as a product; it’s antiviral, antimicrobial, antipathogenic,
all of this stuff and if you look at stuff for people using colloidal silver or liquid
silver for pets, you can just Google it and it’s crazy. It does so many great
things for pets so it’s an awesome product.
(00:58)
I wrote this for a company that they ended up having some internal issues and
whatever. Overall, I like the lead, but again, we can look at it and see what do I
like, what could have I had done differently potentially and all that stuff.
(01:14)
Let’s go ahead and jump in here. I’ll actually tell it you. So the spokesperson
for this is an actor named Robert Catrini who is a really nice guy, by the way.
I actually directed him and made this video and it never really got a bunch
of coverage, which is frustrating, but we were going to use a veterinarian.
We had a veterinarian who was on the team of this product, but then I forget
why we couldn’t use him. He had a conflict of interest or a non-compete with
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 8 --

4	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Silver for Dogs
something else and so, we were scrambling for a spokesperson and we ended
up using this actor and then again, the actor is an awesome guy, great on
camera. But of course, the question became well, how do we make that work
if it’s a thing about pets and he’s not an expert so you’ll kind of see what I did
for this, too.
(02:07)
All right so, “Hi, I’m Robert Catrini. I’m an actor and producer who’s been in over
30 movies and TV shows and you might recognize me from the Jack Reacher
movies where I’ve shared the screen with Tom Cruise or G. I. Joe Retaliation
which starred actors like The Rock and Channing Tatum. Yet while I’m proud
of my 20 plus year career in Hollywood, what I want to talk to you about today
has nothing to do with show business. Instead, it’s an urgent message about
the health of your dog and specifically, it’s a way to dramatically improve
your dog’s health in as little as 6 minutes while potentially saving a thousand
dollars per year or more on your veterinarian bills.
(02:37)
You see, as a dog lover myself and as someone who is close friends to many
of the country’s most respected veterinarians, I’ve seen first-hand how rising
costs in veterinarian care are hurting everyday American families. In fact,
today, it seems like pet care costs keep getting higher and higher. Even as
many people’s household incomes stay the same or even shrinks, which has
led to what I call “The Pet Owner’s Paradox,” which is that while you’d give
almost any amount of money to keep your pet healthy, the amount of spare
money you have isn’t growing and may even be shrinking. The result is you’re
stuck with a feeling of anxiety and worry because even though you love your
dog and even though they are an extended part of your family, you simply don’t
know what would happen if they were to face a life-threatening illness and
you’re scared about having to make the gut-wrenching and horrible decision
between your family’s economic safety and the life of your pet.
(03:23)
Well, from talking to numerous veterinarians and pet health experts, what I’ve
realized over time is that the vast majority of the serious health problems
that cats, dogs, horses and other pets face are all caused by one of three
things, which is why inside this presentation I’m going to pull back the curtain
and share a simple, proven and effective breakthrough. Something that can
address the “three root causes” of pet sickness, something that could help
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

5	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Silver for Dogs
with literally hundreds of different health challenges and that could even save
your dog’s life.
(03:51)
The simple and natural solution starts working instantly, by the way and
because it gets to the root cause of many health problems your dog is facing.
The benefits are almost too numerous to count. The simple and natural
breakthrough I’m about to share with you can rapidly relieve diarrhea, make
bowel movements less messy and reduce gas, quickly revitalizes dry, red
and patchy skin, almost immediately kill the bad bacteria that’s in your dog’s
mouth right now and that’s been causing bad breath, bad teeth and diseased
gums, heal most ear infections in just a few short days, protect against Lyme
disease.” My daughter’s sad because she wants me to come out and I’m a
bad father for doing this so, but I’m going to stop very soon. “Protects against
Lyme disease and most fungal infections including Valley Fever, dramatically
reduce frequent vomiting, dry-heaving and gagging, prevent urinary tract
infections and so much more. I’m going to pause again, see if her crying dies
down.
(04:42)
“Now I know that’s a long list, but as I’m about to show you, more often
than not, each of the health challenges I just listed stems from one of three
things, which is why when you use the simple fix you’ll discover inside this
presentation. It can rapidly and dramatically improve your pet’s health and
do it without any medications or expensive procedures. Surprisingly, the fix
I’m about to share with you doesn’t have anything to do with your pet’s food.
Although, of course, it’s important that you give your dog the best possible
diet possible, especially when many of the so-called “healthy pet foods” out
there are actually anything but healthy and could be wrecking your dog’s well-
being from the inside out.” I’ll explain why in just a minute.
(05:14)
“Finally, you should also know that the simple and natural way to keep your dog
healthy is wildly inexpensive and 100% natural and actually only requires two
simple ingredients yet it could very well save you $1,000 a year in vet costs.
Now, it probably won’t surprise you to hear that many folks in the commercial
pet food industry hate what I’m about to share with you and that there are a
lot of big-money lobbying groups who want to keep this information a secret
because they’d like nothing more than to keep charging you thousands of
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

6	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Silver for Dogs
dollars for the care of your pet. That’s why I strongly urge you to keep watching
this important video all the way to the end because you are only minutes away
from discovering powerful and natural solution to many of your dog’s most
pressing health challenges. Something that will not only help support your
dog’s health now, but that could even add years to his or her life.”
(05:51)
Then again, the background story. “So like I mentioned my name is Robert
Catrini,” blah blah blah. So what would I do differently with this lead, let’s
talk about that. I think even though there’s a credibility of him being an actor
and being in these movies, that could come later because I don’t know if that
outweighs the pain point and the concerns about an urgent message about
people’s pets. I think that’s stuff to be worked in, but I don’t think leading with
it was actually the right move.
(06:18)
In hindsight, if I were going to do this offer again, I probably would move that
down and I would instead been like, “Hi, I’m actor and producer Robert Catrini,
but today I’m not here to talk about movies, I’m here because I have an urgent
message about the health of your pet” because you could still talk about how
he’s an actor maybe and show some screenshot pictures of him. But I want to
get to the pet stuff faster, I think. “You’ll improve your dog’s health in 6 minutes”
is pretty good. Promising to save time and money, we’re doing that. He actually
had a good dog story that I didn’t know until we were filming so in hindsight,
that could have been a good emotional story; there’s not one in here now.
(06:59)
I do really like the idea of the pet owner’s paradox, I still don’t know if I explained
it perfectly. If I fully realized the concept as well as I could have, but I liked
this idea and this conflict of you’ll do anything for your pet but you don’t have
enough money. Then you have this paradox because you want to spend on
them the money but you don’t have unlimited money and I feel like maybe that
could have been even the big idea behind the whole lead and it could have
been better flushed out if I had done that. Again, it’s not that I don’t think this
leads not good, but if I’m just judging things and thinking now with 6 years of
hindsight, I feel like that could have been better.
(07:36)
I also would say the health of your dog here, that was the main demographic
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

7	Stefan Georgi
MODULE 7	Lead Example - Silver for Dogs
but then later, I started talking about cat sources and other pets and things
like that. So I wonder if maybe talking about how this works for almost any
pet earlier would’ve been good. The three root causes of pet sickness is
interesting, but maybe it could have been teased better and then I just feel
like there is a bunch of promises here, but there’s not a central promise and
I feel this goes on for too long, honestly. This is one of the longer ones and I
just feel like I don’t know if I needed that.
(08:11)
You can look at these and see where I match out. I’ve done it for the first
several; I don’t want to go back and match to the outline every time. Maybe I’ll
just give you more of a narrative view of it. But I think the way I approached
this as a whole someone who is close friends with many of the country’s top
or most respected veterinarians, that’s fine. I guess, it’s one thing you don’t
need to have. If you want to hire an actor or a spokesperson, I think you can
do that and they don’t have to be a dog expert, but you can make them a dog
expert. I think that stuff’s cool.
(08:55)
So again, I really think the big thing here is the reason I even want to show this
one is because I looked at this pet owner’s paradox thing again and I was like,
“Man, that’s really good.” That’s one of the things I’d have done differently on
this, but overall, hopefully, that gives you value. I’m going to do one more of
these and we’ll knock that out and then go to spend time with my daughter.
